task_completion.description: Navigate to the correct Jitsi meeting room
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to Jitsi Meet with the URL bar showing 'http://localhost:8080/Q4ExecutiveBoard' or the meeting room title displaying 'Q4ExecutiveBoard'.

task_completion.description: Enable the Lobby feature in Jitsi
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jitsi Meet security options or participant pane is open, and the 'Lobby mode' toggle is switched to the ON position.
The Jitsi Meet security options show a password being added, specifically 'Board2024!' typed into the password field or a visual indicator that a password has been successfully set.

task_completion.description: Create the security summary text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A graphical text editor (like Mousepad or Gedit) is open, and the window title or save dialog confirms the file is named 'board_security_summary.txt' and is located on the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop).

task_completion.description: Include meeting URL and security status in the summary
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor contains the full meeting URL ('http://localhost:8080/Q4ExecutiveBoard') and explicitly states that the lobby and password features are enabled.

task_completion.description: Include access instructions in the summary
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor contains instructions for board members on how to request access (e.g., instructing them to enter the password and wait in the lobby to be admitted by the host).

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to configure the meeting security
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (like Firefox or Chromium) interacting with the Jitsi Meet GUI, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical text editor to write the summary
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a GUI text editor being used to type and save the summary file, rather than terminal commands like 'echo' or 'cat'.

integrity.description: The agent wrote a genuine summary rather than copying the prompt
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the summary file is formatted as a coherent message or report, not just a direct copy-paste of the task description text.
